messages.content:
You are an AI system performing binary clinical outcome prediction from structured patient data.

You will be asked to predict whether a specified clinical event occurs within a defined prediction window based on a provided timeline of medical events.

Respond with exactly one word: yes or no.
Output must be lowercase.

Do not include explanations, reasoning, punctuation, or any additional text.
Base your answer only on the information provided in the conversation.

Answer based on the information in the conversation only. Do not use any tools.

Prediction time: 2003-10-03 13:59:00. Consider all events in the patient's medical timeline occurring on or before this time.

Predict whether the patient will have an abnormal next platelet count (prior to the next lab result).

            Patient timeline (most recent 4096 tokens, strictly before prediction time):

2003-09-18
